case_title: ERNICE FAGAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-11-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE LAWSUIT IS UNTIMELY. THE STATUTE REQUIRES UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE 945.6 THAT THE CLAIM MUST BE FILED NOT LATER THAN 6 MONTHS AFTER THE DATE THAT THE NOTICE WAS DELIVERED OR DEPOSITED IN THE MAIL. THIS CASE IS DISMISSED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leonor Noguez-Ward, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3854, for defendant and moving party;
Eunice Fagan, Tel. 415.684.4054, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. The lawsuit is untimely. The statute requires under Government Code 945.6 that the claim must be filed not later than 6 months after the date that the notice was delivered or deposited in the mail. This case is dismissed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 20, 2013 to give Ms. Fagan the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and the order issued on January 9, 2013. Ms. Fagan must deliver courtesy copies of her opposition/response to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 15, 2013 at 4 pm, or the demurrer will be sustained. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The motion is continued to be heard on February 11, 2013. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition/response with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by January 14, 2013. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court has copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
